introSection: Ultra Twister is a TOGO pipeline roller coaster located at Nagashima Spa Land in Nagashima, Kuwana, Mie, Japan.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Ultra Twister first opened in 1989.

In 2012, both Ultra Twister and Corkscrew were relocated north near Steel Dragon 2000. A kids area that contains Peter Rabbit Coaster now occupies the ride's former area.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Green track and yellow supports. The ride used to feature white track and supports.

fullText:
Ultra Twister is a TOGO pipeline roller coaster located at Nagashima Spa Land in Nagashima, Kuwana, Mie, Japan.

Ultra Twister first opened in 1989.

In 2012, both Ultra Twister and Corkscrew were relocated north near Steel Dragon 2000. A kids area that contains Peter Rabbit Coaster now occupies the ride's former area.



Green track and yellow supports. The ride used to feature white track and supports.
